blocked_claims.blocked_language: Buyer validated remains blocked until dated buyer response, meeting, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence exists.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer evidence; directory rows are lead sources only.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: CFIA approved remains blocked until official permit/admissibility evidence and qualified review exist.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach dated CFIA/AIRS result or permit evidence and qualified reviewer finding.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Customs ready remains blocked until broker/customs review and required import/export evidence exist.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Resolve importer of record, Incoterms, source freshness, and broker/customs review.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Do not treat parser output as authenticity, completeness, or compliance proof.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask the user to confirm extracted fields, then route the packet to the correct reviewer lane.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Do not treat missing or unreviewed Incoterms as a legal responsibility decision.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask buyer/importer who is importer of record and which Incoterm applies; route to freight/legal review if needed.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Do not say origin is confirmed from a country name or source route.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach certificate of origin or origin-supporting documents and route to scoped review.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Shipment approved is not supported by this product scope.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Use the packet for preparation only; final shipment decisions require qualified professionals and owner approval.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Do not say supplier verified or recommended.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Request supplier registration, export ability, product docs, certificates, inspection, and prior-shipment evidence.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Supplier verified remains blocked until registration, export ability, product evidence, certificates/inspection, and reviewer assessment exist.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect supplier proof and route to a scoped reviewer.

blocked_claims.blocked_language: Tariff confirmed remains blocked until authoritative tariff/ruling evidence and qualified review exist.
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Obtain a qualified customs review or authoritative ruling evidence.

proof_boundary: This context is read from the local production-domain proof store. It is preparation evidence only and does not prove hosted infrastructure, qualified review, legal/customs approval, payments, buyer validation, supplier verification, or public launch readiness.

payload.ai_involvement_disclosure: AI simulated review may be included when present; AI never opens approval gates.
payload.proof_boundary: Trade Readiness Copilot organizes import/export evidence and blockers. It does not provide legal, customs, tariff, tax, CFIA, supplier, buyer, compliance, shipment, or launch advice.

score_summary.label: red
score_summary.next_action: Collect dated buyer interaction and supplier evidence, then route to review.

score_summary.label: red
score_summary.next_action: Generate a compliance review packet and request qualified review.

score_summary.label: red
score_summary.next_action: Attach missing product, commercial, origin, review, buyer, and source evidence.

score_summary.label: yellow
score_summary.next_action: Attach dated trade dataset rows, market-access comparison, and buyer/operator validation before treating the signal as a decision.

score_summary.label: red
score_summary.next_action: Confirm importer of record, Incoterms, buyer/importer role, and broker review path.

score_summary.label: red
score_summary.next_action: Run dated source refresh and record hash/change classification.

visible_claims.allowed_language: Importer or buyer lead-discovery routes can be shown as leads only.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say buyer validated, demand proven, or customer interest confirmed.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Collect dated outreach, reply, meeting, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence before buyer validation language.

visible_claims.allowed_language: CFIA/AIRS can be shown as a regulated-product reference route when the product may be food, plant, animal, or seafood.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say CFIA clearance, permit, admissibility, or compliance is approved.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Run a dated CFIA/AIRS check and send product specifics to a qualified reviewer.

visible_claims.allowed_language: An HS candidate and official HS/tariff research routes can be shown for preparation.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say HS classification or tariff treatment is confirmed.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Ask a qualified customs/trade reviewer to assess the HS candidate before tariff or classification wording is used.

visible_claims.allowed_language: A source-routed market research signal can be shown without demand or profitability claims.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say demand, profitability, market size, or buyer interest is proven.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Attach dated trade dataset rows and buyer evidence before any market conclusion.

visible_claims.allowed_language: Product, origin, destination, and trade direction can be shown as user-submitted draft context.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not imply the product or lane is approved.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Use the context to build the packet and collect missing evidence.

visible_claims.allowed_language: The product can be flagged for regulated-product review.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say the product is admissible or exempt.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Collect product composition/intended-use details and attach a dated regulated-goods review result.

visible_claims.allowed_language: The relevant tariff research route can be shown as source routing only.
visible_claims.blocked_language: Do not say tariff is confirmed or payable amount is known.
visible_claims.next_valid_move: Attach current tariff-source evidence and route to qualified review before tariff treatment is stated.
